messages.content: What is the jersey number of the player Xabi Alonso when he takes the penalty kick?

I can answer that, but I need the specific clip or image where Xabi Alonso is taking the penalty—his jersey number depends on the team and season (e.g., Real Madrid vs. Liverpool vs. Spain).

Please upload the image (or share a link and timestamp), and I’ll tell you the jersey number shown when he takes the penalty.
